message:
feat: migrate all 85 #[tokio::test] to sync #[test] with runtime helpers (Phase 3)

Replace all #[tokio::test] async test functions across 13 source files
with synchronous #[test] functions using explicit runtime construction:

- vc_collect (29 tests, 10 files): Centralized run_async_test() helper
  in lib.rs using asupersync RuntimeBuilder + tokio compat bridge
- vc_web (43 tests): run_tokio() helper with asupersync + tokio compat
  bridge for axum endpoint tests that require tokio
- vc_cli (9 tests): run_async() via futures::executor::block_on
- vc_oracle (1 test): run_async() via futures::executor::block_on
- Purely sync tests (ssh.rs, remote.rs): Plain #[test] fn, no wrapper

Also removes unused tokio and asupersync-tokio-compat deps from
vc_oracle and vc_cli Cargo.toml since neither crate uses them.

Zero #[tokio::test] attributes remain in the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
